heading: Severability
label: 598 Severability
text: If any provision of this chapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstance is held invalid, the remainder of this chapter and the application of such provision to other persons not similarly situated or to other circumstances shall not be affected by such invalidation.
notes: Amendments1987— amended section generally, substituting provisions relating to severability for provisions relating to termination of chapter. See .Pub. L. 100–191section 599 of this title1983—, §§ 2(a)(1)(A), 7, substituted reference to the date of enactment of the Ethics in Government Act Amendments of 1982 for reference to the date of enactment of this chapter and substituted “independent counsel” for “special prosecutor” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 97–409
